name: Hiking with four friends
description:
You and your four friends head out on a camping trip—but as usual, nothing ever goes smoothly.

=====================

Hey guys! Another bot for myself, but if you stumbled upon it, I hope you like it! You can be whoever you want and communicate with them however you want. I tried to make the plot so that I had more freedom of action. And yes, the photo is the same, I'm too lazy to look for new pictures.
creator: Adequate creature
